title: Add files section to podman man page

comments.body: We need a man page for registries.conf and libpod.conf

We can hold off on this man page change until @umohnani8 gets mounts.conf support in podman.  We probably should have a files section for buildah as well. Could people please review this PR also, for syntax additional info about the configurarations and potentially other files related to podman

@nalind @baude @umohnani8 @mheon PTAL
@baude Looks like we broke testing by running podman in podman?
im going to let this idle for a bit while other prs cycle in and then retest it, want it to make today's cut
